subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous forts were built during the reign of Mughal Emperor Akbar in Rajasthan?
question_hi: मगही राजा अकबर के अधिकांत में राजस्थान में बनाया गया कौन से नज़रूढ़?
B_en: Meetoli Fort, Kumbhalgarh Fort, Amber Fort
C_en: Amber Fort, Meera Fort, Kumbhalgarh Fort
D_en: Amber Fort, Amer Fort, Kumbhalgarh Fort
explanation_en: Amber Fort, Amer Fort, Kumbhalgarh Fort are the three famous forts built during the reign of Rajput kings in Rajasthan.
